Name: departments_aggregate
SQL: SELECT "_subs"."result_id", "_fld_resp"."root" AS "result" FROM UNNEST($1::text[], $2::json[]) AS "_subs"("result_id", "result_vars") LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (SELECT json_build_object('departments_aggregate', (WITH "_root.base" AS MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM "public"."departments" WHERE "public"."departments"."budget" > $3::numeric) SELECT json_build_object('aggregate', (SELECT json_build_object('count', COUNT(*)) FROM "_root.base")) AS "departments_aggregate")) AS "root") AS "_fld_resp" ON ('true')
